title: Supply Chain Manager - Red Express - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Red Express - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Red Express invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Surat location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Red Express:
Red Express is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Red Express!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
